heading: Revoke JWKS
body:
To revoke the JWK token from the specified identity provider from your federation settings using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider revokeJwk <identityProviderId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas federatedAuthentication federationSettings identityProvider revokeJwk](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-federatedAuthentication-federationSettings-identityProvider-revokeJwk).
